title: Input Translation
text: Input Translation Name of the Keyboard Translation Table used to interpret field data upon input. Expected Value: String of up to 32 characters. Supports Unicode. Default Value: None Description Keyboard Translation Tables can be used to convert character strings during database input or output. This makes it possible to display characters stored in the database that are normally not visible (such as typesetting codes), or to store a key entered in a field as another string. Applies To Component Related Links Database Translation Tables Database translation tables convert character strings during database input or output. This makes it possible to display characters stored in the database that are normally not visible (such as typesetting codes), or to store a key entered in a field as another string. Keyboard Translation Tables A keyboard translation table maps a sequence of input codes received from a keyboard or database to logical function codes and characters recognized by Uniface.
